sa_devanagari: आ यद दुवः शतक्रतवा कामं जरितॄणाम | रणोरक्षं न शचीभिः ||
meaning_en: That, Śatakratu, thou to grace and please thy praisers, as it were, Stirrest the axle with thy strength.

sa_devanagari: नि तवामग्ने मनुर्दधे जयोतिर्जनाय शश्वते | दीदेथ कण्व रतजात उक्षितो यं नमस्यन्ति कर्ष्टयः ||
meaning_en: Manu hath stablished thee a light, Agni, for all the race of men: Sprung from the Law, oil-fed, for Kaṇva hast thou blazed, thou whom the people reverence.

sa_devanagari: होतारं विश्ववेदसं सं हि तवा विश इन्धते | स आ वह पुरुहूत परचेतसो.अग्ने देवानिह दरवत ||
meaning_en: For the men, Agni, kindle thee as all possessor and as Priest; So Agni, much-invoked, bring hither with all speed the Gods, the excellently wise,

sa_devanagari: अभीमवन्वन सवभिष्टिमूतयो.अन्तरिक्षप्रां तविषीभिराव्र्तम | इन्द्रं दक्षास रभवो मदच्युतं शतक्रतुं जवनी सून्र्तारुहत ||
meaning_en: As aids the skilful Ṛbhus yearned to Indra strong to save, who fills mid-air, encompassed round with might, Rushing in rapture; and o’er Śatakratu came the gladdening shout that urged him on to victory.

sa_devanagari: पर मंहिष्ठाय बर्हते बर्हद्रये सत्यशुष्माय तवसे मतिं भरे | अपामिव परवणे यस्य दुर्धरं राधो विश्वायुशवसे अपाव्र्तम ||
meaning_en: To him most liberal, lofty Lord of lofty wealth, verily powerful and strong, I bring my hymn,— Whose checkless bounty, as of waters down a slope, is spread abroad for all that live, to give them strength.

sa_devanagari: होतारं सप्त जुह्वो यजिष्ठं यं वाघतो वर्णते अध्वरेषु | अग्निं विश्वेषामरतिं वसूनां सपर्यामि परयसा यामि रत्नम ||
meaning_en: Agni, the seven tongues' deftest Sacrificer, him whom the priests elect at solemn worship, The Herald, messenger of all the Vasus, I serve with dainty food, I ask for riches.

sa_devanagari: भवा वरूथं गर्णते विभावो भवा मघवन मघवद्भ्यःशर्म | उरुष्याग्ने अंहसो गर्णन्तं परातर्मक्षू धियावसुर्जगम्यात ||
meaning_en: Be thou a refuge, Bright One, to the singer, a shelter, Bounteous Lord, to those who worship. Preserve the singer from distress, O Agni. May he, enriched with prayer, come soon and early.

sa_devanagari: अस्येदेव पर रिरिचे महित्वं दिवस पर्थिव्याः पर्यन्तरिक्षात | सवराळ इन्द्रो दम आ विश्वगूर्तः सवरिरमत्रो ववक्षे रणाय ||
meaning_en: Yea, of a truth, his magnitude surpasseth the magnitude of earth, mid-air, and heaven. Indra, approved by all men, self-resplendent, waxed in his home, loud-voiced and strong for battle.

sa_devanagari: रतस्य देवा अनु वरता गुर्भुवत परिष्टिर्द्यौर्न भूम | वर्धन्तीमापः पन्वा सुशिश्विं रतस्य योना गर्भे सुजातम ||
meaning_en: The Gods approached the ways of holy Law; there was a gathering vast as heaven itself. The waters feed with praise the growing Babe, born nobly in the womb, the seat of Law.

sa_devanagari: अभि तवा गोतमा गिरा जातवेदो विचर्षणे | दयुम्नैरभि पर णोनुमः ||
meaning_en: O JĀTAVEDAS, keen and swift, we Gotamas with sacred song exalt thee for thy glories' sake.

sa_devanagari: आ ते सुपर्णा अमिनन्तमेवैः कर्ष्णो नोनाव वर्षभो यदीदम | शिवाभिर्न समयमानाभिरागात पतन्ति मिहः सतनयन्त्यभ्रा ||
meaning_en: Thy well-winged flashes strengthen in their manner, when the black Bull hath bellowed round about us. With drops that bless and seem to smile he cometh: the waters fall, the clouds utter their thunder.

sa_devanagari: असि हि वीर सेन्यो.असि भूरि पराददिः | असि दभ्रस्य चिद्व्र्धो यजमानाय शिक्षसि सुन्वते भूरि ते वसु ||
meaning_en: Thou, Hero, art a warrior, thou art giver of abundant spoil. Strengthening e’en the feeble, thou aidest the sacrificer, thou givest the offerer ample wealth.

sa_devanagari: युनज्मि ते बरह्मणा केशिना हरी उप पर याहि दधिषे गभस्त्योः | उत तवा सुतासो रभसा अमन्दिषुः पूषण्वान वज्रिन समु पत्न्यामदः ||
meaning_en: Missing Line From Griffith

sa_devanagari: इमं यज्ञमिदं वचो जुजुषाण उपागहि | सोम तवं नोव्र्धे भव ||
meaning_en: Accepting this our sacrifice and this our praise, O Soma, come, And be thou nigh to prosper us.

sa_devanagari: अषाळ्हं युत्सु पर्तनासु पप्रिं सवर्षामप्सां वर्जनस्यगोपाम | भरेषुजां सुक्षितिं सुश्रवसं जयन्तं तवामनु मदेम सोम ||
meaning_en: Invincible in fight, saver in battles, guard of our camp, winner of light and water, Born amid hymns, well-housed, exceeding famous, victor, in thee will we rejoice, O Soma.

sa_devanagari: तवमिमा ओषधीः सोम विश्वास्त्वमपो अजनयस्त्वं गाः | तवमा ततन्थोर्वन्तरिक्षं तवं जयोतिषा वि तमो ववर्थ ||
meaning_en: These herbs, these milch-kine, and these running waters, all these, O Soma, thou hast generated. The spacious firmament hast thou expanded, and with the light thou hast dispelled the darkness.

sa_devanagari: देवेन नो मनसा देव सोम रायो भागं सहसावन्नभि युध्य | मा तवा तनदीशिषे वीर्यस्योभयेभ्यः पर चिकित्सा गविष्टौ ||
meaning_en: Do thou, God Soma, with thy Godlike spirit, victorious, win for us a share of riches. Let none prevent thee: thou art Lord of valour. Provide for both sides in the fray for booty.

sa_devanagari: अश्विना वर्तिरस्मदा गोमद दस्रा हिरण्यवत | अर्वाग रथं समनसा नि यछतम ||
meaning_en: O Aśvins wonderful in act, do ye unanimous direct Your chariot to our home wealthy in kine and gold.

sa_devanagari: तन नो मित्रो वरुणो मामहन्ताम अदितिः सिन्धुः पर्थ्विवी उतो दयौः ||
meaning_en: Missing Line From Griffith.

sa_devanagari: आरे ते गोघ्नमुत पूरुषघ्नं कषयद्वीर सुम्नमस्मे तेस्तु | मर्ळा च नो अधि च बरूहि देवाधा च नः शर्म यछद्विबर्हाः ||
meaning_en: Far be thy dart that killeth men or cattle: thy bliss be with us, O thou Lord of Heroes. Be gracious unto us, O God, and bless us, and then vouchsafe us doubly-strong protection.

sa_devanagari: नासत्याभ्यां बर्हिरिव पर वर्ञ्जे सतोमानियर्म्यभ्रियेव वातः | यावर्भगाय विमदाय जायां सेनाजुवा नयूहतूरथेन ||
meaning_en: I TRIM like grass my song for the Nāsatyas and send their lauds forth as the wind drives rain-clouds, Who, in a chariot rapid as an arrow, brought to the youthful Vimada a consort.

sa_devanagari: अजोहवीदश्विना तौग्र्यो वां परोळ्हः समुद्रमव्यथिर्जगन्वान | निष टमूहथुः सुयुजा रथेन मनोजवसा वर्षणास्वस्ति ||
meaning_en: The son of Tugra had invoked you, Aśvins; borne on he went uninjured through the ocean. Ye with your chariot swift as thought, well-harnessed, carried him off, O Mighty Ones, to safety.

sa_devanagari: पर-पर पूष्णस तुविजातस्य शस्यते महित्वम अस्य तवसो न तन्दते सतोत्रम अस्य न तन्दते | अर्चामि सुम्नयन्न अहम अन्त्यूतिम मयोभुवम | विश्वस्य यो मन आयुयुवे मखो देव आयुयुवे मखः ||
meaning_en: STRONG Pūṣan's majesty is lauded evermore, the glory of his lordly might is never faint, his song of praise is never faint. Seeking felicity I laud him nigh to help, the source, of bliss, Who, Vigorous one, hath drawn to him the hearts of all, drawn them, the Vigorous One, the God.

sa_devanagari: पर हि तवा पूषन्न अजिरं न यामनि सतोमेभिः कर्ण्व रणवो यथा मर्ध उष्ट्रो न पीपरो मर्धः | हुवे यत तवा मयोभुवं देवं सख्याय मर्त्यः | अस्माकम आङगूषान दयुम्निनस कर्धि वाजेषु दयुम्निनस कर्धि ||
meaning_en: Thee, then, O Pūṣan, like a swift one on his way, I urge with lauds that thou mayst make the foemen flee, drive, camel-like, our foes afar. As I, a man, call thee, a God, giver of bliss, to be my Friend, So make our loudly-chanted praises glorious, in battles make them glorious.

sa_devanagari: यस्य ते पूषन सख्ये विपन्यवः करत्वा चित सन्तो ऽवसा बुभुज्रिर इति करत्वा बुभुज्रिरे | ताम अनु तवा नवीयसीं नियुतं राय ईमहे | अहेळमान उरुशंस सरी भव वाजे-वाजे सरी भव ||
meaning_en: Thou, Pūṣan, in whose friendship they who sing forth praise enjoy advantage, even in wisdom, through thy grace, in wisdom even they are advanced. So, after this most recent course, we come to thee with prayers for wealth. Not stirred to anger, O Wide-Ruler, come to us, come thou to us in every fight.

sa_devanagari: अस्या ऊ षु ण उप सातये भुवो ऽहेळमानो ररिवां अजाश्व शरवस्यताम अजाश्व | ओ षु तवा वव्र्तीमहि सतोमेभिर दस्म साधुभिः | नहि तवा पूषन्न अतिमन्य आघ्र्णे न ते सख्यम अपह्नुवे ||
meaning_en: Not stirred to anger, come, Free-giver, nigh to us, to take this gift of ours, thou who hast goats for steeds, Goat-borne! their gift who long for fame. So, Wonder-Worker! may we turn thee hither with effectual lauds. I slight thee not, O Pūṣan, thou Resplendent One: thy friendship may not be despised.

sa_devanagari: मो षु वो अस्मद अभि तानि पौंस्या सना भूवन दयुम्नानि मोत जारिषुर अस्मत पुरोत जारिषुः | यद वश चित्रं युगे-युगे नव्यं घोषाद अमर्त्यम | अस्मासु तन मरुतो यच च दुष्टरं दिध्र्ता यच च दुष्टरम ||
meaning_en: Dadhyac of old, Aṅgiras, Priyamedha these, and Kaṇva, Atri, Manu knew my birth, yea, those of ancient days and Manu knew. Their long line stretcheth to the Gods, our birth-connexions are with them. To these, for their high station, I bow down with song, to Indra, Agni, bow with song.

sa_devanagari: ये देवासो दिव्य एकादश सथ पर्थिव्याम अध्य एकादश सथ | अप्सुक्षितो महिनैकादश सथ ते देवासो यज्ञम इमं जुषध्वम ||
meaning_en: Missing Line From Griffith.

sa_devanagari: कथा ते अग्ने शुचयन्त आयोर्ददाशुर्वाजेभिराशुषाणाः | उभे यत तोके तनये दधाना रतस्य सामन रणयन्तदेवाः ||
meaning_en: How, Agni, have the radiant ones, aspiring, endued thee with the vigour of the living, So that on both sides fostering seed and offspring, the Gods may joy in Holy Law's fulfilment?

sa_devanagari: परस्तुतिर्वां धाम न परयुक्तिरयामि मित्रावरुणा सुव्र्क्तिः | अनक्ति यद वां विदथेषु होता सुम्नं वां सूरिर्व्र्षणावियक्षन ||
meaning_en: Your praise is like a mighty power, an impulse: to you, Twain Gods, a well-formed hymn is offered, As the priest decks yon, Strong Ones, in assemblies, and the prince fain to worship you for blessings.

sa_devanagari: उत मन्ये पितुरद्रुहो मनो मातुर्महि सवतवस्तद धवीमभिः | सुरेतसा पितरा भूम चक्रतुरुरु परजाया अम्र्तंवरीमभिः ||
meaning_en: With invocations, on the gracious Father's mind, and on the Mother's great inherent power I muse. Prolific Parents, they have made the world of life, and for their brood all round wide immortality.

sa_devanagari: आत्मानं ते मनसारादजानामवो दिवा पतयन्तं पतंगम | शिरो अपश्यं पथिभिः सुगेभिररेणुभिर्जेहमानं पतत्रि ||
meaning_en: Thyself from far I recognized in spirit,—a Bird that from below flew through the heaven. I saw thy head still soaring, striving upward by paths unsoiled by dust, pleasant to travel.

sa_devanagari: कया शुभा सवयसः सनीळाः समान्या मरुतः सं मिमिक्षुः | कया मती कुत एतास एते.अर्चन्ति शुष्मं वर्षणो वसूया ||
meaning_en: WITH what bright beauty are the Maruts jointly invested, peers in age, who dwell together? From what place have they come? With what intention? Sing they their strength through love of wealth, these Heroes?

sa_devanagari: कुतस्त्वमिन्द्र माहिनः सन्नेको यासि सत्पते किं त इत्था | सं पर्छसे समराणः शुभानैर्वोचेस्तन नो हरिवो यत्ते अस्मे ||
meaning_en: Whence comest thou alone, thou who art mighty, Indra, Lord of the Brave? What is thy purpose? Thou greetest us when meeting us the Bright Ones. Lord of Bay Steeds, say what thou hast against us.

sa_devanagari: बरह्माणि मे मतयः शं सुतासः शुष्म इयर्ति परभ्र्तो मे अद्रिः | आ शासते परति हर्यन्त्युक्थेमा हरी वहतस्ता नो अछ ||
meaning_en: Mine are devotions, hymns; sweet are libations. Strength stirs, and hurled forth is my bolt of thunder. They call for me, their lauds are longing for me. These my Bay Steeds bear me to these oblations.

sa_devanagari: अतो वयमन्तमेभिर्युजानाः सवक्षत्रेभिस्तन्वः शुम्भमानाः | महोभिरेतानुप युज्महे नविन्द्र सवधामनु हि नो बभूथ ||
meaning_en: Therefore together with our strong companions, having adorned our bodies, now we harness, Our spotted deer with might, for thou, O Indra, hast learnt and understood our Godlike nature.

sa_devanagari: कव सया वो मरुतः सवधासीद यन मामेकं समधत्ताहिहत्ये | अहं हयूग्रस्तविषस्तुविष्मान विश्वस्य शत्रोरनमं वधस्नैः ||
meaning_en: Where was that nature then of yours, O Maruts, that ye charged me alone to slay the Dragon? For I in truth am fierce and strong and mighty. I bent away from every foeman's weapons.

sa_devanagari: भूरि चकर्थ युज्येभिरस्मे समानेभिर्व्र्षभ पौंस्येभिः | भूरीणि हि कर्णवामा शविष्ठेन्द्र करत्वा मरुतो यद्वशाम ||
meaning_en: Yea, much hast thou achieved with us for comrades, with manly valour like thine own, thou Hero. Much may we too achieve, O mightiest Indra, with our great power, we Maruts, when we will it.

sa_devanagari: वधीं वर्त्रं मरुत इन्द्रियेण सवेन भामेन तविषो बभूवान | अहमेता मनवे विश्वश्चन्द्राः सुगा अपश्चकर वज्रबाहुः ||
meaning_en: Vṛtra I slew by mine own strength, O Maruts, having waxed mighty in mine indignation. I with the thunder in my hand created for man these lucid softly flowing waters.

sa_devanagari: अनुत्तमा ते मघवन नकिर्नु न तवावानस्ति देवता विदानः | न जायमानो नशते न जातो यानि करिष्या कर्णुहिप्रव्र्द्ध ||
meaning_en: Nothing, O Maghavan, stands firm before thee; among the Gods not one is found thine equal. None born or springing into life comes nigh thee. Do what thou hast to do, exceeding mighty?

sa_devanagari: एकस्य चिन मे विभ्वस्त्वोजो या नु दध्र्ष्वान कर्णवै मनीषा | अहं हयूग्रो मरुतो विदानो यानि चयवमिन्द्र इदीश एषाम ||
meaning_en: Mine only be transcendent power, whatever I, daring in my spirit, may accomplish. For I am known as terrible, O Maruts I, Indra, am the Lord of what I ruined.

sa_devanagari: को नवत्र मरुतो मामहे वः पर यातन सखीन्रछा सखायः | मन्मानि चित्रा अपिवातयन्त एषां भूत नवेदा म रतानाम ||
meaning_en: Who here hath magnified you, O ye Maruts? speed forward, O ye lovers, to your lovers. Ye Radiant Ones, assisting their devotions, of these my holy rites he ye regardful.

sa_devanagari: न नूनमस्ति नो शवः कस्तद वेद यदद्भुतम | अन्यस्यचित्तमभि संचरेण्यमुताधीतं वि नश्यति ||
meaning_en: NAUGHT is to-day, to-morrow naught. Who comprehends the mystery? We must address ourselves unto another's thought, and lost is then the hope we formed.

sa_devanagari: किं न इन्द्र जिघांससि भरातरो मरुतस्तव | तेभिः कल्पस्व साधुया मा नः समरणे वधीः ||
meaning_en: The Maruts are thy brothers. Why, O Indra, wouldst thou take our lives? Agree with them in friendly wise, and do not slay us in the fight.

sa_devanagari: किं नो भरातरगस्त्य सखा सन्नति मन्यसे | विद्मा हि तेयथा मनो.अस्मभ्यमिन न दित्ससि ||
meaning_en: Agastya, brother, why dost thou neglect us, thou who art our friend? We know the nature of thy mind. Verity thou wilt give us naught.

sa_devanagari: तवमीशिषे वसुपते वसूनां तवं मित्राणां मित्रपते धेष्ठः | इन्द्र तवं मरुद्भिः सं वदस्वाध पराशान रतुथा हवींषि ||
meaning_en: Thou, Lord of Wealth, art Master of all treasures, thou, Lord of friends, art thy friends' best supporter. O Indra, speak thou kindly with the Maruts, and taste oblations in their proper season.

sa_devanagari: आरे सा वः सुदानवो मरुत रञ्जती शरुः | आरे अश्मा यमस्यथ ||
meaning_en: Far be from us, O Maruts, ye free givers, your impetuous shaft; Far from us be the stone ye hurl.

sa_devanagari: परुवीरहं शरदः शश्रमणा दोषा वस्तोरुषसो जरयन्तीः | मिनाति शरियं जरिमा तनूनमप्यु नु पत्नीर्व्र्षणो जगम्युः ||
meaning_en: Many years have I been serving you diligently, both day and night, and through mornings, bringing on old age; decay now impairs the beauty of my limbsn What, therefore, is now (to be done); let husbands approach their wives.

sa_devanagari: न मर्षा शरान्तं यदवन्ति देवा विश्वा इत सप्र्धो अभ्यश्नवाव | जयावेदत्र शतनीथमजिं यत सम्यञ्चा मिथुनावभ्यजाव ||
meaning_en: (Agastya): Penance has not been practised in vain; since the gods protect us, we may indulge all our desires; in this world we may triumph in many conflicts, if we exert ourselves mutually together

sa_devanagari: इमं न सोममन्तितो हर्त्सु पीतमुप बरुवे | यत सीमागश्चक्र्मा तत सु मर्ळतु पुलुकामो हि मर्त्यः ||
meaning_en: (Pupil): I beseech the Soma, which has been drunk in my heart, that it may fully expiate the sin we have committed; man is subject to many desires.

sa_devanagari: तं तवा वयं पितो वचोभिर्गावो न हव्या सुषूदिम | देवेभ्यस्त्वा सधमादमस्मभ्यं तवा सधमादम ||
meaning_en: O Food, from thee as such have we drawn forth with lauds, like cows, our sacrificial gifts, From thee who banquetest with Gods, from thee who banquetest with us.

sa_devanagari: तवमग्ने तवष्टा विधते सुवीर्यं तव गनावो मित्रमहः सजात्यम | तवमाशुहेमा ररिषे सवश्व्यं तवं नरां शर्धो असि पुरूवसुः ||
meaning_en: Thou givest strength, as Tvaṣṭar, to the worshipper: thou wielding Mitra's power hast kinship with the Dames. Thou, urging thy fleet coursers, givest noble steeds: a host of heroes art thou with great store of wealth.

sa_devanagari: तवमग्ने दरविणोदा अरंक्र्ते तवं देवः सविता रत्नधासि | तवं भगो नर्पते वस्व ईशिषे तवं पायुर्दमे यस्तेऽविधत ||
meaning_en: Giver of wealth art thou to him who honours thee; thou art God Savitar, granter of precious things. As Bhaga, Lord of men! thou rulest over wealth, and guardest in his house him who hath served thee well.

sa_devanagari: तवमग्ने अदितिर्देव दाशुषे तवं होत्रा भारती वर्धसेगिरा | तवमिळा षतहिमासि दक्षसे तवं वर्त्रहा वसुपते सरस्वती ||
meaning_en: Thou, God, art Aditi to him who offers gifts: thou, Hotrā, Bhāratī, art strengthened by the song. Thou art the hundred-wintered Iḷā to give strength, Lord of Wealth! Vṛtra-slayer and Sarasvatī.

sa_devanagari: तवमग्ने सुभ्र्त उत्तमं वयस्तव सपार्हे वर्ण आ सन्द्र्शि शरियः | तवं वाजः परतरणो बर्हन्नसि तवं रयिर्बहुलो विश्वतस पर्थुः ||
meaning_en: Thou, Agni, cherished well, art highest vital power; in thy delightful hue are glories visible. Thou art the lofty might that furthers each design: thou art wealth manifold, diffused on every side.

sa_devanagari: तवामग्न आदित्यास आस्यं तवां जिह्वां शुचयश्चक्रिरेकवे | तवां रातिषाचो अध्वरेषु सश्चिरे तवे देवा हविरदन्त्याहुतम ||
meaning_en: Thee, Agni, have the Ādityas taken as their mouth; the Bright Ones have made thee, O Sage, to be their tongue. They who love offerings cling to thee at solemn rites: by thee the Gods devour the duly offered food.

sa_devanagari: तवे अग्ने विश्वे अन्र्तासो अद्रुह आसा देवा हविरदन्त्याहुतम | तवया मर्तासः सवदन्त आसुतिं तवं गर्भो वीरुधां जज्ञिषे शुचिः ||
meaning_en: By thee, O Agni, all the Immortal guileless Gods cat with thy mouth the oblation that is offered them. By thee do mortal men give sweetness to their drink. Bright art thou born, the embryo of the plants of earth.

sa_devanagari: तवं तान सं च परति चासि मज्मनाग्ने सुजात पर च देवरिच्यसे | पर्क्षो यदत्र महिना वि ते भुवदनु दयावाप्र्थिवी रोदसी उभे ||
meaning_en: With these thou art united, Agni; yea thou, God of noble birth, surpassest them in majesty, Which, through the power of good, here spreads abroad from thee, diffused through both the worlds, throughout the earth and heaven.

sa_devanagari: ये सतोत्र्भ्यो गोग्रामश्वपेशसमग्ने रातिमुपस्र्जन्ति सूरयः | अस्माञ्च तांश्च पर हि नेषि वस्य आ बर्हद वदेम विदथे सुवीराः ||
meaning_en: The princely worshippers who send to those who sing thy praise, O Agni, guerdon graced with kine and steeds,— Lead thou both these and us forward to higher bliss. With brave men in the assembly may we speak aloud.

sa_devanagari: तवं नो असि भारताग्ने वशाभिरुक्षभिः | अष्टापदीभिराहुतः ||
meaning_en: Ours art thou, Agni, Bhārata, honoured by us with barren cows, With bullocks and with kine in calf

sa_devanagari: सनेम ये त ऊतिभिस्तरन्तो विश्वा सप्र्ध आर्येण दस्यून | अस्मभ्यं तत तवाष्ट्रं विश्वरूपमरन्धयः साख्यस्य तरिताय ||
meaning_en: May we gain wealth, subduing with thy succour and with the Ārya, all our foes, the Dasyus. Our gain was that to Tṛta of our party thou gavest up Tvaṣṭar's son Viśvarūpa.

sa_devanagari: अस्य सुवानस्य मन्दिनस्त्रितस्य नयर्बुदं वाव्र्धानो अस्तः | अवर्तयत सूर्यो न चक्रं भिनद वलमिन्द्रो अङगिरस्वान ||
meaning_en: He cast down Arbuda what time his vigour was strengthened by libations poured by Tṛta. Indra sent forth his whirling wheel like Sūrya, and aided by the Aṅgirases rent Vala.

sa_devanagari: नूनं सा ते परति वरं जरित्रे दुहीयदिन्द्र दक्षिणा मघोनी | शिक्षा सतोत्र्भ्यो माति धग भगो नो बर्हद वदेम व. स. ||
meaning_en: Now let that wealthy Cow of thine, O Indra, yield in return a boon to him who lauds thee. Give to thy praisers: let not fortune fail us. Loud may we speak, with brave men, in the assembly.

sa_devanagari: अध्वर्यवो यः शतं शम्बरस्य पुरो बिभेदाश्मनेव पूर्वीः | यो वर्चिनः शतमिन्द्रः सहस्रमपावपद भरतासोममस्मै ||
meaning_en: Ye ministers, to him who as with thunder demolished Śambara's hundred ancient castles; Who cast down Varcin's sons, a hundred thousand,—to him, to Indra, offer ye the Soma.

sa_devanagari: अस्मभ्यं तद ... ||
meaning_en: Prepare thyself to grant us that great booty, O Vasu, for abundant is thy treasure. Gather up wondrous wealth, O Indra, daily. Loud may we speak, with heroes, in assembly.

sa_devanagari: अस्य मन्दानो मध्वो वज्रहस्तो.अहिमिन्द्रो अर्णोव्र्तं वि वर्श्चत | पर यद वयो स सवसराण्यछा परयांसि च नदीनां चक्रमन्त ||
meaning_en: Cheered by this meath Indra, whose hand wields thunder, rent piecemeal Ahi who barred up the waters, So that the quickening currents of the rivers flowed forth like birds unto their resting-places.

sa_devanagari: बरह्मणस पते तवमस्य यन्ता सूक्तस्य बोधि तनयं च जिन्व | विश्वं तद भद्रं यदवन्ति देवा बर्हद वदेम ... ||
meaning_en: O Brahmaṇaspati, be thou controller of this our hymn and prosper thou our children. All that the Gods regard with love is blessed. Loud may we speak, with heroes, in assembly.

sa_devanagari: तस्मा इद विश्वे धुनयन्त सिन्धवो.अछिद्रा शर्म दधिरे पुरूणि | देवानां सुम्ने सुभगः स एधते यं-यं ... ||
meaning_en: Missing Line From Griffith.

sa_devanagari: वि मच्छ्रथाय रशनामिवाग रध्याम ते वरुण खां रतस्य | मा तन्तुश्छेदि वयतो धियं मे मा मात्रा शार्यपसः पुर रतोः ||
meaning_en: He made them flow, the Āditya, the Sustainer: the rivers run by Varuṇa's commandment. These feel no weariness, nor cease from flowing: swift have they flown like birds in air around us.

sa_devanagari: यो मे राजन युज्यो वा सखा वा सवप्ने भयं भीरवे मह्यमाह | सतेनो वा यो दिप्सति नो वर्को वा तवं तस्माद वरुणपाह्यस्मान ||
meaning_en: Move far from me what sins I have committed: let me not suffer, King, for guilt of others. Full many a morn remains to dawn upon us: in these, O Varuṇa, while we live direct us.

sa_devanagari: परेतां यज्ञस्य शम्भुवा युवामिदा वर्णीमहे | अग्निंच हव्यवाहनम ||
meaning_en: Ye who bless sacrifice, go forth, for verily we choose you both, And Agni who conveys our gifts.

sa_devanagari: दयावा नः पर्थिवी इमं सिध्रमद्य दिविस्प्र्शम | यज्णन्देवेषु यछताम ||
meaning_en: This our effectual sacrifice, reaching the sky, shall Heaven and Earth Present unto the Gods to-day.

sa_devanagari: आ वामुपस्थमद्रुहा देवाः सीदन्तु यज्ञियाः | इहाद्यसोमपीतये ||
meaning_en: In both your laps, ye guileless Ones, the Holy Gods shall sit them down To-day to drink the Soma here.

sa_devanagari: एता ते अग्ने जनिमा सनानि पर पूर्व्याय नूतनानि वोचम | महान्ति वर्ष्णे सवना कर्तेमा जन्मञ-जन्मन निहितो जातवेदाः ||
meaning_en: To thee who art of old these songs, O Agni, have I declared, the ancient and the later. These great libations to the Strong are offiered: in every birth is Jātavedas stablished.

sa_devanagari: वैश्वानर तव धामान्या चके येभिः सवर्विदभवो विचक्षण | जात आप्र्णो भुवनानि रोदसी अग्ने ता विस्वा परिभूरसि तमना ||
meaning_en: I celebrate thy glories, O Vaiśvānara, wherewith thou, O farsighted God, has found the light. Thou filledst at thy birth both worlds, the earth and heaven: all this, O Agni, hast thou compassed of thyself.

sa_devanagari: अमन्थिष्टां भारता रेवदग्निं देवश्रवा देववातः सुदक्षम | अग्ने वि पश्य बर्हताभि रायेषां नो नेता भवतादनु दयून ||
meaning_en: Both Bharatas, Devaśravas, Devāvata, have strongly rubbed to life effectual Agni. O Agni, look thou forth with ample riches: be, every day, bearer of food to feed us.

sa_devanagari: अग्ने दा दाशुषे रयिं वीरवन्तं परीणसम | शिशीहि नः सूनुमतः ||
meaning_en: Missing Line From Griffith.

sa_devanagari: वर्षणं तवा वयं वर्षन वर्षणः समिधीमहि | अग्ने दीद्यतं बर्हत ||
meaning_en: Missing line from Griffith.

sa_devanagari: मिहः पावकाः परतता अभूवन सवस्ति नः पिप्र्हि पारमासाम | इन्द्र तवं रथिरः पाहि नो रिषो मक्षू-मक्षू कर्णुहि गोजितो नः ||
meaning_en: Far forth are spread the purifying waters convey thou us across them unto safety. Save us, our Charioteer, from harm, O Indra, soon, very soon, make us win spoil of cattle.

sa_devanagari: आ तू भर माकिरेतत परि षठाद विद्मा हि तवा वसुपतिं वसूनाम | इन्द्र यत ते माहिनं दत्रमस्त्यस्मभ्यं तद धर्यश्व पर यन्धि ||
meaning_en: Then bring thou hither, and let none prevent it: we know thee well, the Lord of wealth and treasure. That splendid gift which is thine own, O Indra, vouchsafe to us, Lord of the Tawny Coursers.

sa_devanagari: अभि दयुम्नानि वनिन इन्द्रं सचन्ते अक्षिता | पीत्वी सोमस्य वाव्र्धे ||
meaning_en: To Indra go the treasures of the worshipper, which never fail: He drinks the Soma and is strong

sa_devanagari: इन्द्रो हर्यन्तमर्जुनं वज्रं शुक्रैरभीव्र्तम | अपाव्र्णोद धरिभिरद्रिभिः सुतमुद गा हरिभिराजत ||
meaning_en: The bright, the well-loved thunderbolt, girt with the bright, Indra disclosed, Disclosed the Soma juice pressed out by tawny stones, with tawny steeds drave forth the kine.

sa_devanagari: इन्द्र मरुत्व इह पाहि सोमं यथा शार्याते अपिबः सुतस्य | तव परणीती तव शूर शर्मन्ना विवासन्ति कवयःसुयज्ञाः ||
meaning_en: Here, Indra, drink thou Soma with the Maruts, as thou didst drink the juice beside Śāryāta. Under thy guidance, in thy keeping, Hero, the singers serve, skilled in fair sacrifices.

sa_devanagari: अप्तूर्ये मरुत आपिरेषो.अमन्दन्निन्द्रमनु दातिवाराः | तेभिः साकं पिबतु वर्त्रखादः सुतं सोमं दाशुषः सवे सधस्थे ||
meaning_en: He was your comrade in your zeal, O Maruts: they, rich in noble gifts, rejoiced in Indra. With them together let the Vṛtra-slayer drink in his home the worshipper's libation.

sa_devanagari: अयमस्मान वनस्पतिर्मा च हा मा च रीरिषत | सवस्त्याग्र्हेभ्य आवसा आ विमोचनात ||
meaning_en: Let not this sovran of the wood leave us forlorn or injure us. Safe may we be until we reach our homes and rest us and unyoke.

sa_devanagari: शर्ण्वन्तु नो वर्षणः पर्वतासो धरुवक्षेमास इळया मदन्तः | आदित्यैर्नो अदितिः शर्णोतु यछन्तु नो मरुतः शर्मभद्रम ||
meaning_en: Hear us the mouatains which distil the rain-drops, and, resting firm, rejoice in freshening moisture. May Aditi with the Ādityas hear us, and Maruts grant us their auspicious shelter.

sa_devanagari: मही समैरच्चम्वा समीची उभे ते अस्य वसुना नय्र्ष्टे | शर्ण्वे वीरो विन्दमानो वसूनि म... ||
meaning_en: The two great meeting Bowls hath he united: each of the Pair is laden with histreasure. The Hero is renowned for gathering riches. Great is the Gods’ supreme and sole dominion.

sa_devanagari: न ता मिनन्ति मायिनो न धीरा वरता देवानां परथमा धरुवाणि | न रोदसी अद्रुहा वेद्याभिर्न पर्वता निनमे तस्थिवांसः ||
meaning_en: NOT men of magic skill, not men of wisdom impair the Gods’ first steadfast ordinances. Ne’er may the earth and heaven which know not malice, nor the fixed hills, be bowed by sage devices.

sa_devanagari: उत तया यजता हरी कुमारात साहदेव्यात | परयता सद्य आ ददे ||
meaning_en: And truly those two noble bays I straightway took when offered me, From Sahadeva's princely son.

sa_devanagari: तं युवं देवाव अश्विना कुमारं साहदेव्यम | दीर्घायुषं कर्णोतन ||
meaning_en: Cause him the youthful prince, the son of Sahadeva, to enjoy Long life, O Aśvins, O ye Gods.

sa_devanagari: कविर न निण्यं विदथानि साधन वर्षा यत सेकं विपिपानो अर्चात | दिव इत्था जीजनत सप्त कारून अह्ना चिच चक्रुर वयुना गर्णन्तः ||
meaning_en: When the Bull, quaffing, praises our libation, as a sage paying holy rites in secret, Seven singers here from heaven hath he begotten, who e’en by day have wrought their works while singing.

sa_devanagari: एवेद इन्द्राय वर्षभाय वर्ष्णे बरह्माकर्म भर्गवो न रथम | नू चिद यथा नः सख्या वियोषद असन न उग्रो ऽविता तनूपाः ||
meaning_en: Now, as the Bhṛgus wrought a car, for Indra the Strong, the Mighty, we our prayer have fashioned, That he may, ne’er withdraw from us his friendship, but be our bodies' guard and strong defender.

sa_devanagari: न घा स माम अप जोषं जभाराभीम आस तवक्षसा वीर्येण | ईर्मा पुरंधिर अजहाद अरातीर उत वातां अतरच छूशुवानः ||
meaning_en: Not at his own free pleasure did he bear me: he conquered with his strength and manly courage. Straightway the Bold One left the fiends behind him and passed the winds as he grew yet more mighty.

sa_devanagari: शतम अश्मन्मयीनाम पुराम इन्द्रो वय आस्यत | दिवोदासाय दाशुषे ||
meaning_en: For Divodāsa, him who brought oblations, Indra overthrew A hundred fortresses of stone.

sa_devanagari: उत नूनं यद इन्द्रियं करिष्या इन्द्र पौंस्यम | अद्या नकिष टद आ मिनत ||
meaning_en: Indra, whatever deed of might thou hast this day to execute, None be there now to hinder it.

sa_devanagari: वामं-वामं त आदुरे देवो ददात्व अर्यमा | वामम पूषा वामम भगो वामं देवः करूळती ||
meaning_en: O Watchful One, may Aryaman the God give thee all goodly things. May Pūṣan, Bhaga, and the God Karūḷatī give all things fair.

sa_devanagari: सहस्रा ते शता वयं गवाम आ चयावयामसि | अस्मत्रा राध एतु ते ||
meaning_en: We make a hundred of thy kine, yea, and a thousand, hasten nigh: So let thy bounty come to us.

sa_devanagari: दश ते कलशानां हिरण्यानाम अधीमहि | भूरिदा असि वर्त्रहन ||
meaning_en: We have obtained, a gift from thee, ten water-ewers wrought of gold: Thou, Vṛtra-slayer, givest much.

sa_devanagari: भूरिदा भूरि देहि नो मा दभ्रम भूर्य आ भर | भूरि घेद इन्द्र दित्ससि ||
meaning_en: A bounteous Giver, give us much, bring much and not a trifling gift: Much, Indra, wilt thou fain bestow.

sa_devanagari: भूरिदा हय असि शरुतः पुरुत्रा शूर वर्त्रहन | आ नो भजस्व राधसि ||
meaning_en: O Vṛtra-slayer, thou art famed in many a place as bountiful Hero, thy bounty let us share.

sa_devanagari: पर ते बभ्रू विचक्षण शंसामि गोषणो नपात | माभ्यां गा अनु शिश्रथः ||
meaning_en: I praise thy pair of Tawny Steeds, wise Son of him who giveth kine Terrify not the cows with these.

sa_devanagari: कनीनकेव विद्रधे नवे दरुपदे अर्भके | बभ्रू यामेषु शोभेते ||
meaning_en: Like two slight images of girls, unrobed, upon a new-wrought post, So shine the Bay Steeds in their course.

sa_devanagari: अरम म उस्रयाम्णे ऽरम अनुस्रयाम्णे | बभ्रू यामेष्व अस्रिधा ||
meaning_en: For me the Bays are ready when I start, or start not, with the dawn, Innocuous in the ways they take.

sa_devanagari: तद वो वाजा रभवः सुप्रवाचनं देवेषु विभ्वो अभवन महित्वनम | जिव्री यत सन्ता पितरा सनाजुरा पुनर युवाना चरथाय तक्षथ ||
meaning_en: O Vājas, Ṛbhus, reaching far, among the Gods this was your exaltation gloriously declared, In that your aged Parents, worn with length of days, ye wrought again to youth so that they moved at will.

sa_devanagari: उत समासु परथमः सरिष्यन नि वेवेति शरेणिभी रथानाम | सरजं कर्ण्वानो जन्यो न शुभ्वा रेणुं रेरिहत किरणं ददश्वान ||
meaning_en: And, fain to come forth first amid these armies, this way and that with rows of cars he rushes, Gay like a bridesman, making him a garland, tossing the dust, champing the rein that holds him.

sa_devanagari: उद वाम पर्क्षासो मधुमन्त ईरते रथा अश्वास उषसो वयुष्टिषु | अपोर्णुवन्तस तम आ परीव्र्तं सवर ण शुक्रं तन्वन्त आ रजः ||
meaning_en: Forth come your viands rich with store of pleasant meath, and cars and horses at the flushing of the dawn, Stripping the covering from the surrounded gloom, and spreading through mid-air bright radiance like the Sun.

sa_devanagari: आ वां सहस्रं हरय इन्द्रवायू अभि परयः | वहन्तु सोमपीतये ||
meaning_en: May steeds a thousand bring you both, Indra. and Vāyu, hitherward To drink the Soma, to the feast.

sa_devanagari: रथं हिरण्यवन्धुरम इन्द्रवायू सवध्वरम | आ हि सथाथो दिविस्प्र्शम ||
meaning_en: For ye, O Indra-Vāyu, mount the golden-seated car that aids The sacrifice, that reaches heaven.

sa_devanagari: आपप्रुषी विभावरि वय आवर जयोतिषा तमः | उषो अनु सवधाम अव ||
meaning_en: When thou hast filled it, Fulgent One! thou layest bare the gloom with light. After thy nature aid us, Dawn.

sa_devanagari: शुनासीराव इमां वाचं जुषेथां यद दिवि चक्रथुः पयः | तेनेमाम उप सिञ्चतम ||
meaning_en: Śuna and Sīra, welcome ye this laud, and with the milk which ye have made in heaven Bedew ye both this earth of ours.

sa_devanagari: यज्ञस्य केतुम परथमम पुरोहितम अग्निं नरस तरिषधस्थे सम ईधिरे | इन्द्रेण देवैः सरथं स बर्हिषि सीदन नि होता यजथाय सुक्रतुः ||
meaning_en: Ensign of sacrifice, the earliest Household-Priest, the men have kindled Agni in his threefold seat, With Indra and the Gods together on the grass let the wise Priest sit to complete the sacrifice.

sa_devanagari: अस्य वासा उ अर्चिषा य आयुक्त तुजा गिरा | दिवो न यस्य रेतसा बर्हच छोचन्त्य अर्चयः ||
meaning_en: Yea, this is by the light of him whom powerful song hath bound to act, Whose beams of splendour flash on high as though they sprang from heavenly seed.

sa_devanagari: तं तवा शोचिष्ठ दीदिवः सुम्नाय नूनम ईमहे सखिभ्यः ||
meaning_en: To thee then, O Most Bright, O Radiant God, we come with prayer for happiness for our friends.

sa_devanagari: औछत सा रात्री परितक्म्या यां रणंचये राजनि रुशमानाम | अत्यो न वाजी रघुर अज्यमानो बभ्रुश चत्वार्य असनत सहस्रा ||
meaning_en: Night, well-nigh ended, at Rnancaya's coming, King of the Rusamas, was changed to morning. Like a strong courser, fleet of foot, urged onward, Babhru hath gained four thousand as his guerdon.

sa_devanagari: तवाम इद वर्त्रहन्तम जनासो वर्क्तबर्हिषः | उग्रम पूर्वीषु पूर्व्यं हवन्ते वाजसातये ||
meaning_en: For, Mightiest Vṛtra-slayer, thee, fierce, foremost among many, folk Whose sacred grass is trimmed invite to battle where the spoil is won.

sa_devanagari: सिषक्तु न ऊर्जव्यस्य पुष्टेः ||
meaning_en: Visit us while she shares Urjavya's food.

sa_devanagari: स तु शरुधि शरुत्या यो दुवोयुर्द्यौर्न भूमाभि रायोर्यः | असो यथा नः शवसा चकानो युगे-युगे वयसा चेकितानः ||
meaning_en: Hear what thou mayst hear, thou who, fain for worship, as heaven girds earth, guardest thy servant's treasure; Tlat thou mayst be our own, joying in power, famed through thy might in every generation.

sa_devanagari: तत सु नो विश्वे अर्य आ सदा गर्णन्ति कारवः | बर्बुं सहस्रदातमं सूरिं सहस्रसातमम ||
meaning_en: Missing line from Griffith.

sa_devanagari: नू सद्मानं दिव्यं नंशि देवा भारद्वाजः सुमतिं याति होता | आसानेभिर्यजमानो मियेधैर्देवानां जन्म वसूयुर्ववन्द ||
meaning_en: Come now, O Gods, to your celestial station: the Bharadvājas' priest entreats your favour. He, sacrificing, fain for wealth, hath honoured the Gods vath those who sit and share oblations.

sa_devanagari: नवं नु सतोममग्नये दिवः शयेनाय जीजनम | वस्वः कुविद वनाति नः ||
meaning_en: I have begotten this new hymn for Agni, Falcon of the sky: Will he not give us of his wealth?

sa_devanagari: तं होतारमध्वरस्य परचेतसं वह्निं देवा अक्र्ण्वत | दधाति रत्नं विधते सुवीर्यमग्निर्जनाय दाशुषे ||
meaning_en: Him have the Gods appointed Priest of sacrifice, oblation-bearer, passing wise. Agni gives wealth and valour to the worshipper, to folk who offer up their gifts.

sa_devanagari: राजेव हि जनिभिः कषेष्येवाव दयुभिरभि विदुष कविः सन | पिशा गिरो मघवन गोभिरश्वैस्त्वायतः शिशीहिराये अस्मान ||
meaning_en: For like a King among his wives thou dwellest: with glories, as a Sage, surround and help us. Make us, thy servants, strong for wealth, and honour our songs wirth kine and steeds and decoration.

sa_devanagari: आ नो दधिक्राः पथ्यामनक्त्व रतस्य पन्थामन्वेतवा उ | शर्णोतु नो दैव्यं शर्धो अग्निः शर्ण्वन्तु विश्वे महिषामूराः ||
meaning_en: May Dadhikrās prepare the way we travel that we may pass along the path of Order. May Agni bear us, and the Heavenly Army: hear us all Mighty Ones whom none deceiveth.

sa_devanagari: तन न इन्द्रो वरुणो मित्रो अग्निर... ||
meaning_en: Missing line from Griffith.

sa_devanagari: महे नो अद्य सुविताय बोध्युषो महे सौभगाय पर यन्धि | चित्रं रयिं यशसं धेह्यस्मे देवि मर्तेषु मानुषि शरवस्युम ||
meaning_en: Rouse us this day to high and happy fortune: to great felicity, O Dawn, promote us. Vouchsafe us manifold and splendid riches, famed among mortals, man-befriending Goddess!

sa_devanagari: अस्मे इन्द्रो वरुणो मित्रो अर्यमा दयुम्नं यछन्तु महि शर्मसप्रथः | अवध्रं जयोतिरदितेरताव्र्धो देवस्य शलोकं सवितुर्मनामहे ||
meaning_en: Missing line from Griffith.

sa_devanagari: सतुतश्च यास्त्वा वर्धन्ति महे राधसे नर्म्णाय | इन्द्रकारिणं वर्धन्तः ||
meaning_en: And lauds which strengthen thee for great bounty and valour, and exalt Indra who doeth glorious deeds,

sa_devanagari: अग्ने याहि सुशस्तिभिर्हव्या जुह्वान आनुषक | यथा दूतो बभूथ हव्यवाहनः ||
meaning_en: Called straight to our oblations, come, O Agni, through our eulogies, As thou hast been our envoy bearing up our gifts.

sa_devanagari: वेत्था हि निरतीनां वज्रहस्त परिव्र्जम | अहर-अहः शुन्ध्युः परिपदामिव ||
meaning_en: Thou knowest, Indra, Thunder-armed, how to avoid destructive powers, As one secure from pitfalls each returning day.

sa_devanagari: सदो दवा चक्राते उपमा दिवि सम्राजा सर्पिरासुती ||
meaning_en: Two, highest, in the heavens have set their seat, worshipped with holy oil, imperial Kings.

sa_devanagari: अर्चन्त एके महि साम मन्वत तेन सूर्यमरोचयन ||
meaning_en: Some, singing lauds, conceived the Sāma-hymn, great hymn whereby they caused the Sun to shine.

sa_devanagari: ये देवास इह सथन विश्वे वैश्वानरा उत | अस्मभ्यं शर्म सप्रथो गवे.अश्वाय यछत ||
meaning_en: Ye Deities who stay with us, and all ye Gods of all mankind, Give us your wide protection, give shelter for cattle and for steed.

sa_devanagari: पवन्ते वाजसातये सोमाः सहस्रपाजसः | गर्णाना देववीतये ||
meaning_en: The Soma-drops with thousand powers are purified for victory, Hymned to become the feast of Gods.

sa_devanagari: तन्तुं तन्वानमुत्तममनु परवत आशत | उतेदमुत्तमाय्यम ||
meaning_en: Over the heights have they attained the highest thread that is spun out, And this which must be deemed most high.

sa_devanagari: पुनान इन्दवा भर सोम दविबर्हसं रयिम | वर्षन्निन्दो नौक्थ्यम ||
meaning_en: O Indu, Soma, being cleansed, bring hither riches doublypiled, Wealth, mighty Indu, meet for lauds.

sa_devanagari: परि णो देववीतये वाजानर्षसि गोमतः | पुनान इन्दविन्द्रयुः ||
meaning_en: Thou, Indu, in thy brilliancy, pourest on us, as Indra's Friend, Wealth from the kine to feast the Gods.

sa_devanagari: दिवो धर्तासि शुक्रः पीयूषः सत्ये विधर्मन वाजी पवस्व ||
meaning_en: Thou, bright Juice, art Sustainer of the sky: flow, mighty, in accordance with true Law.

sa_devanagari: यत्रानन्दाश्च मोदाश्च मुदः परमुद आसते | कामस्य यत्राप्ताः कामास्तत्र मामम्र्तं कर्धीन्द्रायेन्दो परि सरव ||
meaning_en: Make me immortal in that realm where happiness and transports, where Joys and felicities combine, and longing wishes are fulfilled. Flow, Indu, flow for Indra's sake.

sa_devanagari: बर्हस्पतिर्नः परि ... ||
meaning_en: Bṛhaspati protect us from the rearward, and from above, and from below, from sinners. May Indra from the front, and from the centre, as Friend to friends, vouchsafe us room and freedom.

sa_devanagari: बर्हस्पतिर्नः परि ... ||
meaning_en: Bṛhaspati protect us from the rearward, and from above, and from below, from sinners. May Indra from the front and from the centre, as Friend to friends, vouchsafe us room and freedom.

sa_devanagari: गर्भ्णामि ते सौभगत्वाय हस्तं मया पत्या जरदष्टिर्यथासः | भगो अर्यमा सविता पुरन्धिर्मह्यं तवादुर्गार्हपत्याय देवाः ||
meaning_en: I take thy hand in mine for happy fortune that thou mayst reach old age with me thy husband. Gods, Aryaman, Bhaga, Savitar, Purandhi, have given thee to be my household's mistress.

sa_devanagari: तां पूषञ्छिवतमामेरयस्व यस्यां बीजं मनुष्यावपन्ति | या न ऊरू उशती विश्रयाते यस्यामुशन्तःप्रहराम शेपम ||
meaning_en: O Pūṣan, send her on as most auspicious, her who shall be the sharer of my pleasures; Her who shall twine her loving arms about me, and welcome all my love and mine embraces.

sa_devanagari: तस्य वयं सुमतौ यज्ञियस्यापि भद्रे सौमनसे सयाम | स सुत्रामा सववानिन्द्रो अस्मे आराच्चिद दवेषः सनुतर्युयोतु ||
meaning_en: May we enjoy his favour, his the Holy may we enjoy his blessed loving kindness. May this rich Indra, as our good Protector, drive off and keep afar all those who hate us.

sa_devanagari: अश्वायन्तो गव्यन्तो वाजयन्तो हवामहे तवोपगन्तवा उ | आभूषन्तस्ते सुमतौ नवायां वयमिन्द्र तवा शुनंहुवेम ||
meaning_en: We call on thee to come to us, desirous of goods and spoil, of cattle, and of horses. For thy new love and favour are we present: let us invoke thee, Indra, as our welfare.
